TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ukhnaagiin Khürelsükh Ukhnaagiin Khürelsükh (ryax sa 14 na byacing tay 6 squ kawas na 1968 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1968) mrhuw Mongolia ta' misuw hya' ga Ukhnaagiin Khürelsükh, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Ukhnaagiin Khürelsükh minkahul sa Ulaanbaatar na Mongolia. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1968 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: ukħnaaɣiin kħ*rels~ɕ*kħ ukħnaaɣiin kħ*rels~ɕ*kħ (rjax s~ɕa ** na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - mis~ɕuw ), ħja ɣa s~ɕquliq na pklaħaŋ ɣaɣa. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw moŋolia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ukħnaaɣiin kħ*rels~ɕ*kħ, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral ukħnaaɣiin kħ*rels~ɕ*kħ minkaħul s~ɕa ulaanβaatar na moŋolia. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
S.FORM: Ukhnaagiin Khürelsükh Ukhnaagiin Khürelsükh (ryax sa 14 na byacing tay 6 squ kawas na 1968 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1968) mrhuw Mongolia ta' misuw hya' ga Ukhnaagiin Khürelsükh, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2021 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Ukhnaagiin Khürelsükh minkahul sa Ulaanbaatar na Mongolia. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1968 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: ukħnaaɣiin kħ*rels~ɕ*kħ ukħnaaɣiin kħ*rels~ɕ*kħ (rjax s~ɕa ** na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ na **** - mis~ɕuw ), ħja ɣa s~ɕquliq na pklaħaŋ ɣaɣa. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw moŋolia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ukħnaaɣiin kħ*rels~ɕ*kħ, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral ukħnaaɣiin kħ*rels~ɕ*kħ minkaħul s~ɕa ulaanβaatar na moŋolia. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
